root_text.sn36.29:1.1: “Ye hi keci, bhikkhave, samaṇā vā brāhmaṇā vā vedanaṁ nappajānanti, vedanāsamudayaṁ nappajānanti, vedanānirodhaṁ nappajānanti, vedanānirodhagāminiṁ paṭipadaṁ nappajānanti …pe…
root_text.sn36.29:1.2: pajānanti …pe… sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharantī”ti.

translation_text.sn36.29:0.2: 3. The Explanation of the Hundred and Eight
translation_text.sn36.29:1.1: “Mendicants, there are ascetics and brahmins who don’t understand feeling, its origin, its cessation, and the practice that leads to its cessation. …
translation_text.sn36.29:1.2: There are ascetics and brahmins who do understand …”
